title: ModernMenus
description: A simple mod that overhauls minecraft's menu screens to a more modern layout
body:
# ModernMenus

A lightweight mod that overhauls minecrafts menu screen to an alternate and modernist layout.

![Main menu screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a7b39cd62abba5427402aed1199ace33ee58b8e_0.webp)

![World select screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84e8f7adec8590b062cc372842956ea5c4237ddf_0.webp)

![server select screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c72fc72afdc568986ca6c0ea239fd67143eb2177_0.webp)

## Issues

Any issues or suggestions can be submitted at [Github Issues](https://github.com/TheCrazyModder/BetterGUI/issues)
